summary: Iteration 49 - Tested Agents Progress Dashboard and member_id/farmer_id refactoring. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend AgentProgressPage loads correctly with summary cards, agent list, and expandable farmer details showing form completion status.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cooperative/agents-progress endpoint returns correct structure with agents array and summary object
Summary fields (total_agents, total_farmers, farmers_5_5, average_progress) are accurate - Bielaghana shows 2 agents, 3 farmers, 2 at 5/5, 87% average
Per-farmer form status (register, ici, ssrte, parcels, photos) is correctly tracked as boolean values
Frontend AgentProgressPage renders all UI elements: summary cards, search bar, agent cards with progress bars
Expandable agent cards show farmer details with form badges (green checkmark for complete, red X for incomplete)
Cooperative dashboard has 'Progression Agents' quick action button that navigates to /cooperative/agents-progress
Parcel endpoints work correctly with string member_id - GET and POST both function properly
agent_search.py _get_farmer_parcels() correctly queries parcels by both farmer_id and member_id as strings

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements render correctly, navigation works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Agents Progress Dashboard is fully functional. Cooperative Bielaghana has 2 agents: Ziri (0 farmers) and Kone Alphone (3 farmers: Balde ibo 3/5, Koffi 5/5, KINDA YABRE 5/5). The endpoint correctly tracks 5 form types: register, ici, ssrte, parcels, photos. Parcel queries use string member_id. The quick action button on cooperative dashboard navigates to /cooperative/agents-progress.

features_verified.agents_progress_structure_correct: PASS - has agents array and summary object
features_verified.per_farmer_form_status_accurate: PASS - Balde ibo 3/5, Koffi 5/5, KINDA YABRE 5/5
features_verified.frontend_page_renders: PASS - summary cards, search bar, agent cards all render
features_verified.frontend_expandable_details: PASS - clicking agent card shows farmer form details
features_verified.parcel_queries_string_member_id: PASS - GET and POST work with string member_id

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cooperative/agents-progress: PASS - Returns correct agent progress data
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cooperative/members/{id}/parcel: PASS - Returns parcels with string member_id
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cooperative/members/{id}/parce: PASS - Creates parcel with string member_id
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers: PASS - Returns farmers with completion status

frontend_tests.summary_cards_display: PASS - 4 cards: Agents, Fermiers Assignes, Fermiers a 5/5, Progression Moyenne
frontend_tests.agent_card_expansion: PASS - Shows 3 farmer rows with form badges
frontend_tests.form_badges_display: PASS - 15 form badges (5 per farmer x 3 farmers)
frontend_tests.dashboard_quick_action: PASS - Progression Agents button present and functional
